artPrompt: A wiry goblin rogue hurrying down a rain-slick alley with a bulging satchel clutched tight, hood up, glancing back over one shoulder; reflections of warm amber lamplight smear across wet cobbles, his small cart trailing in shadow, ink-black walls melting into smoky brown haze around a single soft glow, motion blurred into dreamy nighttime hush, intimate and furtive, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Dark Money Courier
text:
Haste
When Dark Money Courier enters the battlefield, create a Treasure token. The cash arrives untraceable and slightly damp.
flavorText: Bag in, bag out, no questions, no plates on the cart.
